_comment: Copy to mcp_servers.json (next to the neoethos-mcp binary, or pass --config PATH). Each server is connected on startup; the app's Supervisor/Codex sees their tools via GET /tools and invokes them via POST /call.

servers.name: ctrader
servers._note: cTrader official remote MCP (AI Agent Connect). Authenticates against cTrader Web on first use — a separate consent surface from the app's OAuth token; never share tokens across paths.

servers.name: filesystem
servers._note: Official filesystem MCP server, scoped to the given directory. Change '.' to the path you want the assistant to read/write.

servers.name: web
servers._note: Example web-search MCP (Brave). Requires the server's own API key in its environment. Swap for any web-search MCP server you prefer.
